name: proactive-agent
tagline: ClawHub (821★): Transform AI agents from task-followers into proactive partners that anticipate needs and continuously improve. Now with WA
verdict: Relies throughout on tools that may not exist (memory_search, cron, trash) with no check for whether they're available, so failures surface late. The description gives no 'use when' cue and no 'don't use for' boundary, so a dispatcher has little to go on for a broad, persistent behavior.

highlights.summary: Description states what the skill is/does and lists feature names, but gives no 'use when' cue, task type, or example phrasing a dispatching agent could match against.
No 'NOT for' / 'out of scope' / pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in the description or body, despite this being a broad, persistent behavioral overlay that could ea
17 largely independent, only-sometimes-needed topics (Tool Migration Checklist, Growth Loops, Heartbeat System, ADL/VFM, Six Pillars, etc.) are all pasted inline in one 631-line SK
